libraryItemId.description: The unique identifier of the new library item.

status.description: The status of the new library item, such as "Published".

createdAt.description: The date and time the library item was created.

createdBy.description: The user who created the library item.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the library item was last updated.

updatedBy.description: The user who last updated the library item.

ratingCount.description: The number of ratings the library item has received from users.

isVerified.description: Indicates whether the library item has been verified.

fileId.description: The unique identifier assigned to the file to be uploaded.

presignedUrl.description: The URL for a presigned S3 POST operation used to upload a file.

presignedUrlFields.description: The form fields to include in the presigned S3 POST operation used to upload a file.

presignedUrlExpiration.description: The date and time that the presigned URL will expire in ISO 8601 format.

appVersion.description: The version of the new Q App.

appId.description: The unique identifier of the Amazon Q App for which permissions are returned.

permissions.description: The list of permissions granted for the Amazon Q App.
